text:
2014/1/15 Dima Panov <fluffy@freebsd.org>:
> Shoud be fixed. Port require now a modern compiler (clang>=33, gcc>=4.7)
Yep, freerdp can be successfully built with gcc47, so this PR may be closed.
But it still fails with clang-3.3 on 9.2-RELEASE as desribed there -
ports/185796
